dir.commands:
select 'init$StockVarianceReportforConsolidate$(this);' as message from dmstt return
&XMLWhenFilterLoading; &XMLWhenFilterClosing;
declare @vcID varchar(33) select @vcID = stt_rec from kkyc where so_ct = @so_ct exec rs_rptStockVarianceReportforConsolidate @vcID, @@language, @@userID, @@admin
declare @$none nvarchar(512), @vcDate smalldatetime, @isLocked tinyint select @vcDate = ngay_ct from kkyc with(index(so_ct)) where so_ct = @so_ct and ngay_ct between @ngay_ct1 and @ngay_ct2 if @vcDate is null begin select @$none = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Không có yêu cầu kiểm kê theo điều kiện đang lọc.' else N'No data matching filter condition.' end select 'so_ct' as field, isnull(@$none, '') as message end else begin select @isLocked = case when @vcDate <= ngay_ks_kk then 1 else 0 end from dmstt select '' as field, '' as message, 'on$Filter$Retrieve$QueryComplete(this, ' + str(@isLocked) + ');' as script end
